title: activity — settings
description: Tenant-editable settings. Two groups: `activity` (tenant-wide feed preferences + broadcast toggles; owner + admin) and `activity_digest_prefs` (per-user opt-in for digest emails; user-scoped).

groups.label: Activity feed
groups.description: Tenant-wide preferences for the activity feed feature. Owner + admin only.

fields.name: broadcast_enabled
fields.label: Enable live activity streaming
fields.helpText: When on, tenant.{id}.activity + user.{id}.activity broadcast to subscribed clients. When off, the feed polls every 15s.

fields.name: broadcast_disabled_log_names
fields.label: Skip broadcast for these feeds
fields.helpText: Selected feeds are recorded to the DB but do not broadcast. Useful for high-volume feeds like 'attendance' on large tenants.

sections.label: Feed collapsing
sections.description: How the feed groups related activities.

fields.name: batch_collapse_threshold
fields.label: Collapse threshold (activities per batch)
fields.helpText: How many same-batch activities before the feed collapses to 'X made N changes'. Below this, each activity surfaces individually.

sections.label: Retention transparency
sections.description: How the tenant sees purge activity.

fields.name: notify_admins_on_purge
fields.label: Send weekly purge summary to admins
fields.helpText: Every Monday, admins receive a summary of activity rows deleted / archived in the past 7 days. Retention transparency requirement — recommended on.

groups.label: Activity digest emails
groups.description: Per-user preferences for activity digest emails. Every user can configure their own.

fields.name: digest_cadence
fields.label: Digest frequency
fields.helpText: Daily digests summarise the last 24h; weekly summarises the last 7 days.

fields.name: digest_log_names
fields.label: Which feeds to include
fields.helpText: Selected feeds appear in the digest. Empty = every feed you can access.

fields.name: digest_include_own_activity
fields.label: Include activities I caused
fields.helpText: By default the digest shows only activities other people caused (things happening TO your entities). Turn on to include your own actions too.
